core_mechanism: the topological genus (large-N / 't Hooft) expansion of a random-matrix integral used as a generating function that enumerates pairing/chord-diagram configurations graded by the genus of the surface on which they embed
brief_reason: The abstract enumerates contact structures by their genus (the topological character of pseudoknots) via a matrix-model formulation, which is exactly the perturbative genus expansion of a matrix integral counting pairings weighted by the topology of the surface they draw.
